{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks what ICD-10 stands for. The relevant documents provide direct evidence. In Document [3], it states: 'The 10th Revision of the International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10), introduced in 1993, was the first significant classification system to recognize Asperger syndrome (AS).' This clearly identifies ICD-10 as the 'International Classification of Diseases, 10th revision'. Similarly, Document [25] references 'the International Classification of Diseases, 10th revision (ICD-10)' in the context of diagnosing postconcussive syndrome. Other options are not supported: there is no mention of 'International Classification of Drugs', 'Disabilities', or 'Disasters' in relation to ICD-10.
